files.data:
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2017",
    "lib": ["dom", "dom.iterable", "esnext"],
    "allowJs": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "strict": true,
    "noEmit": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "module": "esnext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "jsx": "react-jsx",
    "incremental": true,
    "plugins": [
      {
        "name": "next"
      }
    ],
    "paths": {
      "@/*": ["./src/*"]
    }
  },
  "include": [
    "next-env.d.ts",
    "**/*.ts",
    "**/*.tsx",
    ".next/types/**/*.ts",
    ".next/dev/types/**/*.ts",
    "**/*.mts"
  ],
  "exclude": ["node_modules"]
}

@import "tailwindcss";:root{--bg:#eef2f7;--panel:#ffffff;--ink:#0f172a;--muted:#64748b;--line:#e2e8f0;--primary:#0ea5e9;--primary-dark:#0284c7;--keep:#10b981;--extend:#3b82f6;--shorten:#f59e0b;--danger:#ef4444;--radius:16px;--shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(15,23,42,0.08);}*{box-sizing:border-box;}html,body{min-height:100%;}body{margin:0;color:var(--ink);background:radial-gradient(1200px 600px at 10% -10%,#dbeafe 0%,transparent 55%),radial-gradient(900px 500px at 100% 0%,#e0f2fe 0%,transparent 50%),var(--bg);font-family:var(--font-geist-sans),system-ui,sans-serif;}.app-shell{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;padding:1.25rem 1rem 2.5rem;}.app-header{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:1.25rem;}.app-kicker{margin:0;font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--primary-dark);}.app-title{margin:0.15rem 0 0;font-size:1.75rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-0.02em;}.app-desc{margin:0.25rem 0 0;color:var(--muted);font-size:0.95rem;}.stage-pills{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5rem;padding-top:0.35rem;}.pill{width:2rem;height:2rem;border-radius:999px;display:grid;place-items:center;font-weight:700;font-size:0.9rem;background:#fff;border:2px solid var(--line);color:var(--muted);}.pill-on{background:var(--primary);border-color:var(--primary);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(14,165,233,0.35);}.pill-line{width:1.5rem;height:2px;background:var(--line);}.stage-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.35fr 0.9fr;gap:1rem;}.stage-grid-wide{grid-template-columns:1.2fr 0.95fr;}@media (max-width:900px){.stage-grid,.stage-grid-wide{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}.panel{background:var(--panel);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--radius);box-shadow:var(--shadow);padding:1.15rem 1.2rem 1.25rem;}.panel-header{margin-bottom:0.25rem;}.panel-title{margin:0.4rem 0 0;font-size:1.25rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-0.01em;}.panel-sub{margin:0.35rem 0 0;color:var(--muted);font-size:0.9rem;line-height:1.45;}.badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;padding:0.2rem 0.55rem;border-radius:999px;font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.04em;text-transform:uppercase;background:#e0f2fe;color:#0369a1;}.date-field{width:100%;text-align:left;border:2px solid var(--line);background:#f8fafc;border-radius:12px;padding:0.85rem 1rem;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color 0.15s,box-shadow 0.15s,background 0.15s;}.date-field:hover{border-color:#cbd5e1;}.date-field-active{border-color:var(--primary);background:#f0f9ff;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(14,165,233,0.15);}.date-field-label{display:block;font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:0.35rem;}.date-field-value{display:block;font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--ink);}.stat-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.75rem;}.stat-card{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:12px;padding:0.85rem 0.9rem;background:#f8fafc;}.stat-card-accent{background:linear-gradient(160deg,#f0f9ff 0%,#e0f2fe 100%);border-color:#bae6fd;}.stat-label{display:block;font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.04em;color:var(--muted);}.stat-value{display:block;margin-top:0.25rem;font-size:1.75rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-0.03em;line-height:1.1;}.stat-unit{font-size:0.95rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--muted);}.stat-hint{display:block;margin-top:0.3rem;font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--muted);}.action-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:0.55rem;}.action-btn{border:2px solid transparent;border-radius:12px;padding:0.85rem 0.5rem;font-weight:700;font-size:0.92rem;cursor:pointer;color:#fff;transition:transform 0.1s,filter 0.15s,box-shadow 0.15s;}.action-btn:disabled{opacity:0.4;cursor:not-allowed;}.action-btn:not(:disabled):active{transform:scale(0.98);}.action-keep{background:var(--keep);}.action-extend{background:var(--extend);}.action-shorten{background:var(--shorten);color:#1c1917;}.action-btn-active{box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(15,23,42,0.12);filter:brightness(1.05);border-color:#0f172a;}.primary-btn{appearance:none;border:none;border-radius:12px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#0ea5e9 0%,#0284c7 100%);color:#fff;font-weight:700;font-size:1rem;padding:0.95rem 1rem;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(2,132,199,0.28);transition:filter 0.15s,transform 0.1s;}.primary-btn:hover:not(:disabled){filter:brightness(1.05);}.primary-btn:disabled{opacity:0.45;cursor:not-allowed;box-shadow:none;}.secondary-btn{appearance:none;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:10px;background:#fff;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600;font-size:0.9rem;padding:0.6rem 0.9rem;cursor:pointer;}.secondary-btn:hover{background:#f8fafc;}.link-btn{appearance:none;border:none;background:none;color:var(--primary-dark);font-weight:600;font-size:0.85rem;cursor:pointer;padding:0;}.num-key{appearance:none;border:1px solid var(--line);background:#fff;border-radius:12px;min-height:3.4rem;font-size:1.25rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);cursor:pointer;transition:background 0.12s,transform 0.08s;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,0.04);}.num-key:hover{background:#f8fafc;}.num-key:active{transform:scale(0.97);background:#e2e8f0;}.num-key-muted{background:#f1f5f9;color:var(--muted);font-size:1.05rem;}.num-key-today{background:#0f172a;color:#fff;border-color:#0f172a;font-size:1rem;letter-spacing:0.02em;}.num-key-today:hover{background:#1e293b;}.section-label{margin:0 0 0.5rem;font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);}.req{font-weight:500;color:#b45309;font-size:0.75rem;margin-left:0.35rem;}.opt{font-weight:500;color:var(--muted);font-size:0.75rem;margin-left:0.35rem;}.chip-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.5rem;}.chip{appearance:none;border:2px solid var(--line);background:#fff;border-radius:999px;padding:0.55rem 0.95rem;font-weight:600;font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--ink);cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.12s;}.chip:hover:not(:disabled){border-color:#94a3b8;}.chip-selected{background:#0f172a;border-color:#0f172a;color:#fff;}.chip-optional.chip-selected{background:#0ea5e9;border-color:#0284c7;}.barcode-panel{min-height:220px;}.barcode-result{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.85rem;}.qr-image{width:220px;height:220px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid var(--line);background:#fff;}.barcode-text{width:100%;margin:0;padding:0.85rem 1rem;background:#0f172a;color:#e2e8f0;border-radius:10px;font-size:0.78rem;line-height:1.5;white-space:pre-wrap;word-break:break-word;font-family:var(--font-geist-mono),ui-monospace,monospace;}.error-text{margin:0;color:var(--danger);font-size:0.88rem;font-weight:600;}.app-footer{margin-top:1.25rem;text-align:center;font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.4;}
